The '''MorningStar-B''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] popular with [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] around the time of the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. It was a variant of the [[MorningStar-A starfighter]] with 3 heavy laser cannons instead of a concussion missile launcher.

{{Ship-stub}}
